title: Committee on Kapaligiran (Environment and Sustainability)
subtitle: Environment and Sustainability
desc: Spearheads environmental conservation initiatives, climate action campaigns, and sustainable community programs.
mission: To mobilize youth-led ecological frameworks that advocate for carbon reduction, zero-waste practices, and robust local biodiversity protection across regional networks.
movement: Project Verde: A national tree-growing campaign and comprehensive plastic neutrality drive launched across local coastal barangays.

title: Committee on Kaayusan (Peace, Order, and Good Governance)
subtitle: Peace, Order, and Good Governance
logo: assets/img/Committees Logo/PEACE AND ORDER & GOOD GOVERNANCE.png
desc: Promotes leadership integrity, policy alignment, civic responsibility, and youth participation in local governance.
mission: To cultivate absolute transparency, civic literacy, and ethical accountability frameworks within student councils and youth grassroots associations.
movement: The Kabataan Katapatan Initiative: A series of national youth leadership integrity forums and active local ordinance monitoring workshops.

title: Committee on Komunikasyon (Communication and Participation)
subtitle: Communication and Participation
desc: Manages public relations, strategic outreach, and community engagement frameworks to bridge the gap between leadership and the youth.
mission: To maximize public informational distribution, establish decentralized student feedback systems, and drive cross-channel creative messaging campaigns.
movement: AYL Voice Network: A collaborative multimedia publication hub and regional network bulletin launched to unite distant youth chapters.

title: Committee on Education and Leadership Development
subtitle: Leadership Development
desc: Organizes capacity-building seminars, skills training workshops, and educational modules to empower the next generation of leaders.
mission: To design progressive learning modules, distribute localized study toolkits, and mentor grassroots youth organizations in executive project planning.
movement: The Youth Leadership Academy (YLA): A standardized weekend fellowship certificate program targeting prospective student council executives.

title: Committee on Partnership and Community Engagement
subtitle: Community Engagement
desc: Fosters high-impact institutional alliances, collaborative community programs, and networking pathways with stakeholders.
mission: To build sustainable strategic intersections between municipal governance bodies, non-profit institutions, and student council alliances.
movement: Sama-Sama Synergy: A structural coalition portal mapping resource-sharing networks to support underfunded public school sectors.

title: Committee on Health and Wellness
subtitle: Public Health & Well-Being
desc: Drives medical outreach drives, public health awareness campaigns, and community nutrition programs to foster wellness.
mission: To bridge standard public healthcare information barriers and organize active preventative medical missions within vulnerable sectors.
movement: Oplan Kalusugan: A decentralized health awareness caravan focusing on rural first-aid preparedness and pediatric nutrition distributions.

title: Committee on Sports, Arts, and Culture
subtitle: Talent and Heritage Development
desc: Cultivates creative expression, athletic excellence, and cultural heritage preservation through tournaments and art exhibitions.
mission: To preserve indigenous local heritage narratives while building competitive sports development paths to counter youth substance vulnerability.
movement: The AYL Sining at Lakas Festival: An annual multi-district basketball open paired alongside interactive regional heritage mural installations.

title: Committee on Disaster Preparedness
subtitle: Community Resilience
logo: assets/img/Committees Logo/disaster preparedness and community resiliences.png
desc: Spearheads emergency response training, hazard mapping workshops, and active relief mobilizations to strengthen local resilience.
mission: To institutionalize practical climate hazard education and build rapidly deployable youth community disaster response taskforces.
movement: Project Handog Ligtas: A dynamic emergency simulation framework deploying customized household emergency bag kits to flood-prone areas.

title: Committee on Agriculture
subtitle: Food Security & Agri-Tech
desc: Advocates for modern youth-led agricultural practices, community urban gardens, and sustainable food security pipelines.
mission: To reposition sustainable farming structures as an accessible, high-tech venture space for the modern generation of urban youth.
movement: The Green Grid Movement: A technical developmental system establishing community hydroponic setups inside low-income residential zones.

title: Committee on Mental Health and Well-Being
subtitle: Awareness and Well-Being
logo: assets/img/Committees Logo/MENTAL HEALTH AND WELL BEING.png
desc: Destigmatizes mental health discussions by organizing psychological first-aid sessions and wellness safe spaces.
mission: To dismantle localized systemic psychological taboos through private group guidance platforms and safe peer-led counseling channels.
movement: The SafeSpace Collective: A specialized counseling hotline project backed by digital psychological first-aid toolkit deployment.

title: Committee on Creatives and Media
subtitle: Digital Content & Multimedia Production
desc: Champions the digital narrative of the alliance, generating visual campaigns, documentation, and multimedia content.
mission: To maintain absolute brand alignment and deploy high-production digital visual campaigns that capture AYL's local community footprint.
movement: The AYL Lens Project: A comprehensive annual digital storytelling docuseries tracking grassroots member innovations.

title: Committee on Gender and Development
subtitle: Inclusivity and Empowerment
desc: Promotes gender equality, human rights advocacies, and safe, inclusive developmental spaces for all members.
mission: To engineer legally supported anti-discrimination policies and construct gender-equal development frameworks within partner communities.
movement: The Equality Alliance Forum: A series of intersectional human rights conventions and safe leadership mentorship tracks for LGBTQ+ youth.
